labels.label:
Attributes used:

- http_invoke.original_target_url
- http_invoke.method
- http_invoke.mime_type

 - skip_adding_channel_to_request When set to TRUE SbTech channel token will not be fetched and added to URL

- http_invoke.max_retries (default 3)
- http_invoke.counter - always sets to zero at beginning
